description_long: This object is a sleek, modern knife with a sharply pointed, single-edged blade and a distinctive carbon fiber texture. The blade is elongated and tapers to a fine tip, ideal for precision cutting or piercing. The handle is integrated into the blade's form, featuring three ergonomic finger holes and a large circular cutout, likely for improved grip and reduced weight. The entire object has a matte black finish with a visible carbon fiber weave pattern, giving it a high-tech, lightweight appearance. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, and the design is minimalist with no decorative elements. The knife appears to be constructed from a single piece of material, emphasizing strength and durability.
description: A modern, carbon fiber knife with a pointed blade and ergonomic handle featuring multiple cutouts. The design is minimalist, lightweight, and entirely matte black.
description_view_0: The knife is seen edge-on, showing its thin profile and the straight alignment of the blade and handle.
description_view_1: The full side view reveals the pointed blade, three finger holes, a large circular cutout, and the carbon fiber texture.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, mirroring view 0, emphasizing the slimness and straightness of the object.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, with the blade's point and handle cutouts clearly visible.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, contoured with three finger holes and a large circular cutout, carbon fiber texture
